# Account Asset Batch Compute

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Add the possibility to compute assets in batch.
This module adds a flag on compute assets wizard in order to execute
this process in batch.
